name: Trello
description: Native Trello tools for OpenClaw — list boards, create/move cards, add comments, manage checklists.

apiKey.description: Trello API key (plain string or SecretRef). Get yours at https://trello.com/app-key

token.description: Trello token (plain string or SecretRef). Generate at https://trello.com/app-key (click Token)
